chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-237 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 28-10-2025. Mr. Moinuddin Akhter Qureshi advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G a/w SIP Ghulam Murtaza SHO P.S Nabiser Road. = S.H.O P.S Nabisar Road furnished his report alongwith memo of house search and other documents, which is taken on record. Respondent No.3 Premon produced all alleged detainees/ minors namely Hero, Kamoon, Kewal and Reshman before this Court. On query, all the alleged detainees/minors have shown their willingness to go with their mother/ applicant. Therefore, custody of the alleged detainees/ minors is handed over to their mother/ applicant Shr. Neelan. However, respondent Premon, father of the alleged detainees/ minors, is at liberty to approach concerned Guardian and Wards Court for redressal of his grievance in accordance with law. In view of above, this Criminal Miscellaneous application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE *Saleem*
